channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Chip firm ASML to slash 1,700 jobs and posts record profit for 2025 thanks to AI boom
item.description: Dutch semiconductor chip machine maker ASML recorded a record net profit of 9.6 billion euros ($11.5 billion) in 2025 on sales of 32.7 billion euros fueled by AI-driven demand, the company reported Wednesday as it also announced plans to slash its workforce by about 1,700, about 4% of its workforce.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Silent Hill fans have a great excuse to check out Fatal Frame 2: Crimson Butterfly Remake as Koei Tecmo and Konami announce collaboration
item.description: Koei Tecmo announces Fatal Frame 2: Crimson Butterfly Remake demo and a collaboration with one of the best horror games of the decade.
item.dc:creator: Rhys Wood, TechRadar

item.title: A brand new Android voice typing supertool
item.description: For all the things I’m endlessly tweaking and fine-tuning on my mobile devices, my Android keyboard app is typically quite constant.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How to watch Champions League Gameweek 8: Free Streams & TV Channels
item.description: All the ways to watch Champions League 2025/26 Matchday 8 live streams online and from anywhere, as the league phase reaches its fascinating conclusion.
item.dc:creator: Andy Murray, TechRadar

item.title: Wonder Man ending explained: what happens to Simon and Trevor, is there a post-credits scene, and more on the new Marvel TV show's finale
item.description: Want to know what the future might hold for Simon Williams and Trevor Slattery in the MCU? TechRadar has got you covered.
item.dc:creator: Tom Power, TechRadar

item.title: Experts warn that Trump’s use of AI images pushes new boundaries
item.description: The Trump administration has not shied away from sharing AI-generated imagery online, embracing cartoonlike visuals and memes and promoting them on official White House channels.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Why your AI agents need a trust layer before it’s too late
item.description: When one compromised agent brought down our entire 50-agent ML system in minutes, I realized we had a fundamental problem. We were building autonomous AI agents without the basic trust infrastructure that the internet established 40 years ago with DNS.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Smart pill confirms when medication is swallowed
item.description: MIT engineers design smart pill that confirms medication ingestion using biodegradable antenna technology. The pill safely breaks down in stomach within days.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: FedRAMP is getting faster, new automation and pilots promise approvals in months, not years
item.description: "If you want outcomes, you need to get these technologies into the hands of our agencies today," said Irina Denisenko. The post FedRAMP is getting faster, new automation and pilots promise approvals in months, not years first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Intel nabs Qualcomm veteran to lead GPU initiative
item.description: Intel and Qualcomm have traded executives several times over the years, and the trading continues with Intel luring away Qualcomm’s GPU lead. Eric Demers, a long-time industry veteran GPU engineer, joins Intel as senior vice president and the lead of its GPU engineering team.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: New Relic extends observability into ChatGPT-hosted apps
item.description: New Relic introduced an application monitoring capability in its Intelligent Observability Platform that the company says will equip enterprise customers with visibility into the performance, reliability, and user experience of apps embedded in AI-driven interfaces, such as ChatGPT.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: DLA turns to AI, ML to improve military supply forecasting
item.description: The agency aims to raise demand planning and forecasting accuracy from a current 60% baseline to 85%. The post DLA turns to AI, ML to improve military supply forecasting first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: Lawmakers press acting CISA director on workforce reductions
item.description: Some lawmakers were frustrated with a lack of information from acting CISA director Madhu Gottumukkala on the impact of steep staffing cuts at CISA. The post Lawmakers press acting CISA director on workforce reductions first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network
